entity.label: Ard
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Descent, a grandson of Benjamin (Num. 26:38-40). In 1 Chr. 8:3 he is called Addar. His descendants are mentioned in Num. 26:40.

nodes.label: Ard
nodes.description: Descent, a grandson of Benjamin (Num. 26:38-40). In 1 Chr. 8:3 he is called Addar. His descendants are mentioned in Num. 26:40.

nodes.label: Bela
nodes.description: The eldest son of Benjamin (Num. 26:38; “Belah,” Gen. 46:21).

nodes.label: Abihud
nodes.description: One of the sons of Bela, the son of Benjamin (1 Chr. 8:3); called also Ahihud (ver. 7).

nodes.label: Addar
nodes.description: Ample, splendid, son of Bela (1 Chr. 8:3); called also “Ard” (Gen. 46:21)

nodes.label: Ahoah
nodes.description: Brotherly, one of the sons of Bela, the son of Benjamin (1 Chr. 8:4). He is also called Ahiah (ver. 7) and Iri (1 Chr. 7:7). His descendants were called Ahohites (2 Sam. 23:9, 28).

nodes.label: Jerimoth
nodes.description: One of the sons of Bela (1 Chr. 7:7).

nodes.label: Uzzi
nodes.description: A son of Bela, and grandson of Benjamin (1 Chr. 7:7).

nodes.label: Uzziel
nodes.description: A son of Bela, and grandson of Benjamin (1 Chr. 7:7).

verses.text: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the family of the Ardites: and of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.
